findings.evidence: `JHolomorphicEnergy.lean:66` and `:86` specialize to `IsComplexLinearMap (AlmostComplexStructure.product ℝ) J F`; the adjacent API already proves the analogous area estimates generically first at `JHolomorphicLine.lean:148`/`:158` and only then specializes to the standard line at `:198`/`:206`.
findings.fix: First add generic lemmas with signature like `{U} [AddCommGroup U] [Module ℝ U] {J₀ : AlmostComplexStructure U} {F₀ : U →ₗ[ℝ] V} (hF : IsComplexLinearMap J₀ J F₀) (v : U)`, proving the identities for `F₀ (J₀ v)` and `F₀ v`; derive the standard-line lemmas by taking `v = stdComplexLineReal`.
findings.issue: The public `associatedBilinForm_apply_stdComplexLineImag_self_eq` / `...Real_self_eq_symplecticForm` lemmas are over-specialized to `ℝ × ℝ` and `stdComplexLineReal`, although their proofs use only complex-linearity and apply to any `v` in any complex source.

summary: The compatibility and within-set generality gaps from the prior review are fixed. One remaining API issue is that the linear algebra identity is proved only for the standard-line basis instead of the natural arbitrary complex source vector, then specialized.
